cards.back: A low-fidelity, physical representation of a product's user interface and user experience, often used for early testing and feedback
The level of detail and realism in a prototype, with higher fidelity prototypes being more similar to the final product
The level of detail and complexity in a prototype, with deeper prototypes having more features and functionalities
The process of creating a mock-up or model of a product's user interface and user experience, often used to test and refine the design
The combination of visual elements and interactive features that make up a product's interface and provide a positive user experience
